A '''twistler''' was a drink made with [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corellian brandy/Legends|brandy]] and a tart [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] extract. [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] enjoyed these regularly, serving them to his aide [[Sena Leikvold Midanyl]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] when the latter two visited his base in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. While Han enjoyed the beverage, Lando was too preoccupied with unfolding events to appreciate his.
